name: Namecheap
description: Namecheap domain registrar - register domains, manage DNS, check availability, and handle domain contacts

credential_fields.name: apiUser
credential_fields.label: Api User
credential_fields.description: Namecheap API username (usually your account username)

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Namecheap API key (generate from Account > Profile > Tools > API Access)

credential_fields.name: clientIp
credential_fields.label: Client Ip
credential_fields.description: Your whitelisted IP address (must be whitelisted in Namecheap account)

credential_fields.name: mode
credential_fields.label: Mode
credential_fields.description: API mode: live or sandbox (default: live)

credential_fields.name: apiKey
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Namecheap API key (generate from Account > Profile > Tools > API Access)

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List all domains in your Namecheap account with pagination. Returns domain names, expiration dates, and status. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

pageSize.description: Number of domains per page (default: 20, max: 100)

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check if one or more domain names are available for registration. Pass a comma-separated list of domains. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

domainList.description: Comma-separated list of domains to check (e.g. 'example.com,example.net,example.org')

tools.name: get_domain_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific domain including status, dates, nameservers, and WHOIS guard status. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

domainName.description: The domain name to get info for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: register_domain
tools.description: Register a new domain name. Requires domain name, years, and contact information fields passed in the request body. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

years.description: Number of years to register for (1-10)

tools.name: renew_domain
tools.description: Renew an existing domain registration for additional years. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

years.description: Number of years to renew for (1-10)

tools.name: get_dns_hosts
tools.description: Retrieve all DNS host records for a domain. Requires the second-level domain (SLD) and top-level domain (TLD) as separate parameters. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

tools.name: set_dns_hosts
tools.description: Set DNS host records for a domain. Replaces all existing records. Pass host record fields (HostName1, RecordType1, Address1, etc.) in the request body. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

tools.name: get_contacts
tools.description: Retrieve the contact information (registrant, tech, admin, aux billing) for a domain. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

domainName.description: The domain name to get contacts for (e.g. 'example.com')

tools.name: get_tld_list
tools.description: Get pricing information for all available TLDs including registration, renewal, and transfer prices. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.

tools.name: set_nameservers
tools.description: Set custom nameservers for a domain. Provide the nameservers as a comma-separated string. Note: Namecheap returns XML responses.
